title: Cross-platform push notification compatibility
description: Ensure push notifications work reliably across all popular browsers and on iOS and Android. This includes handling iOS Safari's PWA-only push requirement, Android Chrome quirks, Firefox differences, and Edge support. Add platform-specific detection and guidance in the UI.
acceptance_criteria: Push notifications work on Chrome (desktop, Android)
Push notifications work on Firefox (desktop, Android)
Push notifications work on Safari (macOS 13+ and iOS 16.4+)
On iOS Safari: if not in PWA/standalone mode, UI guides user to Add to Home Screen before enabling notifications
On iOS Safari: if in PWA mode, standard push subscription flow works
Notification icons display correctly on all platforms (appropriate sizes for each)
Notification click correctly opens/focuses the app on all platforms
Service worker push event handler accounts for platform differences in payload format
Subscription change events are handled (re-subscribe if browser rotates keys)
VAPID key format is compatible with all platforms
Manifest.json has all required fields for PWA installability on both Android and iOS

ios_specifics: iOS requires PWA (standalone) mode for push — detect with matchMedia('(display-mode: standalone)')
iOS may deliver payload differently (check event.data formats)
iOS needs apple-touch-icon in HTML head
Safari may require explicit notification permission flow
android_specifics: Android Chrome uses FCM as the push service — this is transparent via standard Web Push
Verify badge and icon display correctly
manifest_updates: Ensure icons include PNG rasters (not just SVG) for broader compatibility
Add 'id' field to manifest for update identity
Consider adding 'screenshots' for richer install prompt on Android
existing_infrastructure: Service worker already handles push events with Safari-specific payload detection
Manifest exists but only has SVG icons — may need PNG fallbacks

testing_requirements: Test full subscribe + receive flow on Chrome desktop
Test full subscribe + receive flow on Chrome Android
Test full subscribe + receive flow on Safari macOS
Test full subscribe + receive flow on Safari iOS (PWA mode)
Test iOS non-PWA mode shows Add to Home Screen guidance
Test notification click behaviour on each platform
Verify notification appearance (icon, title, body) on each platform

context.user_story: As a player using any device or browser, I want push notifications to work reliably so I don't miss selection alerts or availability reminders
context.existing_code: Service worker has some Safari detection, manifest has SVG-only icons
